items.source: “Hoekom is jy so koud?” — “Omdat ek dood is.”
refs: "Why are you so cold?" "Because I'm dead."

items.source: Yster is harder as goud.
refs: Iron is harder than gold.

items.source: Yidir is iemand wat gewoond is daaraan om te lieg.
refs: Yidir is somebody who is used to lying.

items.source: Hy het my vir meer geld gevra as wat hy nodig het.
refs: He asked me for more money than he needed.

items.source: Dit behoort goed te wees.
refs: This should be good.

items.source: Die swart boks is nie regtig swart nie.
refs: The black box is not actually black.

items.source: Tom is nie bang vir jou nie.
refs: Tom isn't afraid of you.

items.source: Hy het aansoek gedoen vir 'n werk.
refs: He has applied for a job.

items.source: Dit reën baie tydens die reënseisoen.
refs: It rains a lot during the rainy season.

items.source: Sy het net haar bene gerêk.
refs: She was just stretching her legs.

items.source: Niks goed kan daarvan kom nie.
refs: Nothing good can come of all this.

items.source: Ek drink selde bier.
refs: I don't often drink beer.

items.source: Wie se kind is dit?
refs: Whose kid is this?

items.source: Ek dink nie ons gaan genoeg tyd hê nie.
refs: I don't think we'll have enough time.

items.source: Dit is 'n olyf.
refs: This is an olive.

items.source: Dit is nie die woord van God nie.
refs: This is not the word of God.

items.source: Medusa het my versteen!
refs: Medusa petrified me!

items.source: Die hoofstad van Liechtenstein is Vaduz.
refs: The capital of Liechtenstein is Vaduz.

items.source: Hier is jou boeke.
refs: Here are your books.

items.source: Lees asseblief hierdie boek.
refs: Please read this book.

items.source: Hulle het vir 'n aantal jare in Spanje gewoon.
refs: They lived in Spain for several years.

items.source: Sy het gedink haar ouers is dood.
refs: She thought her parents had died.

items.source: Ek is 'n kat.
refs: I'm a cat.

items.source: Ek sal net vir 'n paar dae hier wees.
refs: I'll only be here for a few days.

items.source: Hy doen iets in die geesteswetenskappe.
refs: He does something in the humanities.

items.source: Tom is 'n klein seuntjie.
refs: Tom is a small boy.

items.source: Hallo. Hoe gaan dit?
refs: Good day. How are you?

items.source: Hy het ons gevra om stil te bly.
refs: He asked that we be silent.

items.source: Daardie huis is te huur.
refs: That house is for rent.

items.source: Ek is 'n hoer.
refs: I'm a whore.

items.source: Ek heet nie Eve nie.
refs: My name is not Eve.

items.source: Ek het dit vir myself gekoop, nie vir jou nie.
refs: I bought it for myself, not for you.

items.source: Hy het gesterf sodat ons kon lewe.
refs: He died so that we may live.

items.source: Het Tom vir haar toestemming gegee?
refs: Did Tom give her permission?

items.source: Ek kon nie sy gesig in fokus kry nie.
refs: I couldn't bring his face into focus.

items.source: Hulle is baie welaf.
refs: They are very wealthy.

items.source: Hierdie is 'n baie gevaarlike woonbuurt.
refs: This is a very dangerous neighborhood.

items.source: Hoe kan hulle seker wees?
refs: How can they be sure?

items.source: Jy praat Japanees baie goed.
refs: You speak Japanese so well!

items.source: Die meermin het in seeskuim verander.
refs: The mermaid turned to foam.

items.source: Bêl my voor jy kom.
refs: Call me before you come.

items.source: Die vervolging van dïegene wat 'n staatsgreep probeer uitvoer is nie 'n heksejag nie.
refs: Prosecuting those who attempted a coup is not a witch hunt.

items.source: Hoekom dra jy altyd daardie hoed?
refs: Why do you always wear that hat?

items.source: Tom gee nooit op nie.
refs: Tom never gives up.

items.source: Hy moet daardie vertrek skoonmaak.
refs: He must clean that room.

items.source: Ek sal nooit geld aan enigiemand leen nie.
refs: I would never lend money to anyone.

items.source: Met wie het jy gepraat?
refs: Who did you talk to?
With whom did you talk?

items.source: Ek wil nie hê jy moet dink dat ek nie gelukkig is met jou besluit nie.
refs: I don't want you to think that I'm not happy with your decision.

items.source: Die kinders gaan reeds skool toe.
refs: The kids already go to school.

items.source: Die goeie student leer nou die leermeester.
refs: The good student now teaches the teacher.

items.source: Hierdie pruime is ryp.
refs: These plums are ripe.

items.source: Ziri se palm bome dra baie minder dadels.
refs: Ziri's palm trees produce much less dates.

items.source: Algeria is ryk aan natuurlike gasse.
refs: Algeria is rich in natural gas.

items.source: Luister en leer iets.
refs: Listen and learn something.

items.source: Ek is die keiser van die aarde.
refs: I am the emperor of Earth.

items.source: Ons het vanmiddag 'n lekker lang gesprek gehad.
refs: We had a nice long talk this afternoon.

items.source: Ek dink Latyn is nie so moeilik soos Grieks nie.
refs: I think Latin is not as hard as Greek.

items.source: Beplan jy om na daardie restaurant te gaan?
refs: Do you intend to go to that restaurant?

items.source: Jy moes verkeerd gehoor het.
refs: You must’ve misheard it.

items.source: Daar is nie genoeg lemoene nie.
refs: There are not enough oranges.

items.source: Ek wonder hoe dit nou lyk.
refs: I wonder what it looks like now.

items.source: Hy het 'n meisie van Juneau ontmoet.
refs: He met a girl from Juneau.

items.source: Tom is in die ruimte gebore.
refs: Tom was born in space.

items.source: Hierdie is die slegste plek om te probeer omdraai.
refs: This is the worst possible place to try to make a U-turn.

items.source: Sy het gelieg oor waar sy was.
refs: She lied about where she'd been.

items.source: Om te kan weet, moet jy lees.
refs: To know, you have to read.

items.source: Tom is baie moeg.
refs: Tom is very tired.

items.source: Hy het 'n groot restaurant naby die see.
refs: He has a large restaurant close to the ocean.

items.source: Dit is goed vir ons om ander kulture te verstaan.
refs: It is good for us to understand other cultures.

items.source: Jy is baie ryk.
refs: You are very wealthy.

items.source: James was dubbeld Amanda se kêrel se ouderdom.
refs: James was twice the age of Amanda's boyfriend.

items.source: Dit is 'n moeilike spel om te speel.
refs: This is a difficult game to play.

items.source: Wat dink jy van Maria se huis?
refs: What do you think about Mary's house?

items.source: Kan ek op julle albei staatmaak om daar te wees?
refs: Can I count on you both to be there?

items.source: Tom en Mary sê hulle dink nie John sal Alice toelaat om dit te doen nie.
refs: Tom and Mary say they don't think John would let Alice do that.

items.source: Dit is heeltemaal gratis vir Tom.
refs: It is completely free for Tom.

items.source: Hy hou 'n dagboek.
refs: He keeps a diary.

items.source: Wat het Elias vir jou gedoen?
refs: What has Elias done for you?

items.source: Wie se idee was dit om so 'n kleurvolle asdrom vir die voortuin te koop?
refs: Who had the idea to buy such a colourful dustbin for the front yard?

items.source: Gee my 'n paar voorbeelde.
refs: Just give me a few examples.

items.source: Hy is 'n baie oulike seun.
refs: He's a very nice boy.

items.source: Daar bestaan nie so iets soos kunsmatige intelligensie nie.
refs: There's no such thing as Artificial Intelligence.

items.source: My kat is siek.
refs: My cat is sick.

items.source: Sy vriende het vir hom gelag.
refs: He was laughed at by his friends.

items.source: Nietemin is ek steeds paranoïes.
refs: I'm still paranoid.

items.source: Hoekom is Februarie so kort?
refs: Why is February so short?

items.source: Daar was geen warm water nie.
refs: There was no hot water at all.

items.source: Ek hou regtig baie van die reën.
refs: I really love the rain.

items.source: Ek het die oorskiet brood gestoor.
refs: I stored the leftover bread.

items.source: Die demokrasie is dood.
refs: Democracy is dead.

items.source: Mary sal moontlik beter voel sodra sy iets te ete gekry het.
refs: Mary will probably feel better once she gets something to eat.

items.source: Die dier sal nie binne die volgende twee jaar seksuele volwassenheid bereik nie.
refs: The animal will not reach sexual maturity for another two years.

items.source: My vriend is baie tale magtig.
refs: My friend is proficient in many languages.

items.source: Sy is nog in die kombuis, of nie?
refs: She's still in the kitchen, isn't she?

items.source: Hy het gesê hy sal blomme vir haar koop.
refs: He said that he'd buy flowers for her.

items.source: Hierdie yskas moet ontvries word.
refs: This fridge needs defrosting.

items.source: Ek het gesukkel om dit te doen.
refs: I struggled to do it.

items.source: België is nie so groot soos Frankryk nie.
refs: Belgium is not as big as France.

items.source: Haar naam is Eve.
refs: Her name is Eve.

items.source: Tom is nie baie oud nie.
refs: Tom isn't very old.

items.source: Ek sal later vanmiddag tyd hê om jou te help.
refs: I'll have time to help you later in the afternoon.

items.source: Hierdie is iets wat ek op jou stoep gevind het.
refs: This is something that I found on your porch.

items.source: Dit is belangrik om baie boeke te lees.
refs: It's important to read a lot of books.

items.source: Spinnekoppe het nie ore nie.
refs: Spiders don't have ears.

items.source: Wil jy tee maak? Jy moet eers die ketel vol water maak.
refs: Do you want to make tea? First you have to fill the kettle with water.

items.source: Ek sal jou nou daarvan vertel.
refs: I'll tell you about it now.

items.source: Ek het my wettenskap verloor.
refs: I lost my bet.

items.source: Die grassnyer is petrol aangedrewe.
refs: This lawn mower is gas powered.

items.source: Ek is 'n slegte verloorder.
refs: I'm a bad loser.

items.source: Tom het my vertel hy dink Mary is oulik.
refs: Tom told me that he thought Mary was cute.

items.source: Ek dink ek kan dit probeer.
refs: I guess I could give it a shot.

items.source: Tom berei homself vir die Duolingo Engelse toets voor.
refs: Tom is preparing himself for the Duolingo English Test.

items.source: Ek wil weet wat Tom dink.
refs: I want to know what Tom thinks.

items.source: Dit was na middernag, Fadil en Layla het geslaap.
refs: It was after midnight, and Fadil and Layla were sleeping.

items.source: Hierdie boek se voorwoord is nogal kort.
refs: The foreword to this book is quite short.

items.source: Tom sal dit volgende keer doen.
refs: Tom will do that the next time.

items.source: Sal jy die vashou?
refs: Will you hold this?

items.source: Jy is 'n baie gawe man!
refs: What a generous man you are!

items.source: Isabel se vaardige hantering van die skeduleringsfout het nie ongemerk by haar bestuurders verbygegaan nie.
refs: Isabel's adroit handling of the scheduling mishap didn't go unnoticed by her superiors.

items.source: Tom probeer om van sy ou gewoontes ontslae te raak.
refs: Tom is trying to unlearn his old habits.

items.source: Dit is 'n groot gemors.
refs: This is a terrible mess.

items.source: Wat is jou gunsteling bordspel?
refs: What's your favorite board game?

items.source: Daar is 'n appel onder die lessenaar.
refs: There is an apple under the desk.

items.source: Tom is 'n naam.
refs: Tom is a name.

items.source: Die boek is wit.
refs: The book is white.

items.source: Daardie koffie wat jy vir my toe gebring het, het my lewe gerêd.
refs: That coffee that you brought me at that time saved my life.

items.source: Het jy Tom se nuutste musiek video gesien?
refs: Have you seen Tom's latest music video?

items.source: Die meermin het in skuim verander.
refs: The mermaid turned to foam.

items.source: Dit het baie duidelik gelyk.
refs: It seemed very obvious.

items.source: Ek woon net 'n entjie verder af in die pad.
refs: I live just a bit further down the road.

items.source: Ek en Tom het vir die eerste keer in Boston ontmoet.
refs: Tom and I first met in Boston.

items.source: Sy antwoord het haar verras.
refs: His reply surprised her.

items.source: Tom wil nie kollege toe gaan nie.
refs: Tom doesn't want to go to college.

items.source: Hy het sy vriende genader vir hulp.
refs: He turned to his friends for help.

items.source: Trek uit jou T-hemp.
refs: Take off your t-shirt.

items.source: Ons wil jou nie pla nie.
refs: We don't want to be a burden to you.

items.source: Sami was in my klas.
refs: Sami was in my class.

items.source: Dit is 'n eik.
refs: It's an oak tree.

items.source: In watter taal droom jy?
refs: What language do you dream in?

items.source: Goeie naand, hoe gaan dit?
refs: Good afternoon, how are you?

items.source: Hulle het mekaar uitgedaag om nuwe avonture aan te pak.
refs: They challenged each other to take on new adventures.

items.source: Die projek se tydlyn was drasties verkort.
refs: The project timeline was drastically shortened.

items.source: Kulturele verval kom een of ander tyd voor.
refs: Decadence always arrives sooner or later.

items.source: Ek hou van ham en eiers.
refs: I like ham and eggs.

items.source: Tom is ook 'n Franse onderwyser.
refs: Tom is a French teacher, too.

items.source: Jou advies het regtig baie gehelp.
refs: Your advice has been really helpful.

items.source: Dit het geen betekenis nie.
refs: It has no meaning.

items.source: Ek is oortuig dat iets tussen hulle aan die gang is.
refs: I am convinced that something is happening between them.

items.source: Lukas het die deur onmiddelik gesluit.
refs: Lukas immediately locked the door.

items.source: Hy is ons derde seun.
refs: He's our third son.
